mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by more than 0.2 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 5-day returns in over 65% of instances where UNRATE rises above the 0.2pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand growth that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns when RSAFS and HOUST both grow, with a Rank IC below 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production levels signal strengthening manufacturing output that generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days, but only during periods of stable inflation.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 20-day returns when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3% annually, or the signal loses predictive power in high-inflation regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month gains in total nonfarm payrolls directly increase aggregate consumer spending capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show zero or negative correlation with PAYEMS growth across all tested rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above a 0.4% monthly threshold forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 60-day returns in more than 70% of months where CPIAUCSL rises above the 0.4% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly retail sales confirms broad-based economic expansion that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined GDPC1 and RSAFS growth signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC over 3-year rolling windows, or fails to outperform single-series baselines.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals a synchronized supply-side contraction that produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines fail to predict negative 5-day returns when UNRATE is stable or falling, or the signal shows no predictive edge in contractionary regimes.
